---
title: '"Thesis" Manuscript'
author: "Carter E. Watson"
date: "2025-07-18"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


## Load All Required Packages

```{r packages}
require(tidyverse)
require(dplyr)
require(sf)
require(ggpubr)
require(scico)
require(ncdf4)
require(geosphere)
require(RColorBrewer)
require(ggnewscale)
require(knitr)
```


## Map Code (Infrastructure to run other cells)

```{r pressure, include=FALSE}
states <- st_read("./data/geography/cb_2018_us_state_500k.shp")
physiographic <- st_make_valid(st_read("./data/geography/physio_shp/physio.shp"))
selected_states <- states %>% 
  filter(NAME %in% c("Ohio", "Kentucky", "North Carolina", "Virginia", "West Virginia", "Tennessee"))
clipped_physiographic <- st_intersection(physiographic, selected_states)
box_coords <- data.frame(
  long = c(-82.878, -79.425, -79.652, -82.991, -82.878),
  lat = c(38.967, 38.830, 36.141, 36.274, 38.967))
box_polygon <- st_polygon(list(cbind(box_coords$long, box_coords$lat))) %>% 
  st_sfc(crs = st_crs(clipped_physiographic))
inside_regions <- st_intersection(clipped_physiographic, box_polygon) #WHERE THE STATES AND THE BOX OVERLAP.
outside_regions <- st_difference(clipped_physiographic, box_polygon) #OUTSIDE WHERE THE STATES AND BOX OVERLAP
inside_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Greens"))(length(unique(inside_regions$PROVINCE))) #MAKE IT GREEN INSIDE.
outside_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Blues"))(length(unique(outside_regions$PROVINCE))) #AND BLUE OUTSIDE.
inside_palette <- setNames(inside_colors, unique(inside_regions$PROVINCE)) #MAKE THE KEY FOR INSIDE THE BOX.
outside_palette <- setNames(outside_colors, unique(outside_regions$PROVINCE)) #AND THE KEY FOR OUTSIDE THE BOX.
outside_regions <- outside_regions %>% mutate(color = outside_palette[PROVINCE]) %>%
  group_by(color) %>%
  summarize(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  ungroup()
inside_regions <- inside_regions %>% mutate(color = inside_palette[PROVINCE]) %>%
  group_by(color) %>%
  summarize(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  ungroup()
combined_regions <- bind_rows(
  inside_regions,
  outside_regions)
selected_states <- st_transform(selected_states, crs = 4326)
combined_regions <- st_transform(combined_regions, crs = 4326)

standardized_theme <- theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 10), legend.title = element_text(size = 12), legend.key.width = unit(1.5, 'cm'),
                            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face="bold"))
```


## MAKING INSIDE DEFORESTATION DATA FRAME:

```{r}
inside_18.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.001_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1) %>% select(-X)
inside_18.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.002_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2) %>% select(-X)
inside_18.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.003_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3) %>% select(-X)
inside_18.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.004_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4) %>% select(-X)
inside_18.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.005_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5) %>% select(-X)
inside_18.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.006_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6) %>% select(-X)

inside_17.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.001_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1) %>% select(-X)
inside_17.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.002_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2) %>% select(-X)
inside_17.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.003_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3) %>% select(-X)
inside_17.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.004_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4) %>% select(-X)
inside_17.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.005_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5) %>% select(-X)
inside_17.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.006_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6) %>% select(-X)
inside <- bind_rows(inside_18.001, inside_18.002, inside_18.003, inside_18.004, inside_18.005, inside_18.006, inside_17.001, inside_17.002, inside_17.003, inside_17.004, inside_17.005, inside_17.006)

inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.001_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.002_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.003_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.004_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.005_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_18.006_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6) %>% select(-X)

inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.001_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.002_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.003_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.004_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.005_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/deforested/December2025_17.006_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6) %>% select(-X)
inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN <- bind_rows(inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.001, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.002, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.003, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.004, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.005, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.006, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.001, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.002, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.003, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.004, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.005, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.006)


inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.001_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.002_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.003_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.004_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.005_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.006_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)

inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.001_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.002_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.003_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.004_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.005_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.006_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
inside_VERTICAL_WS <- bind_rows(inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.001, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.002, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.003, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.004, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.005, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.006, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.001, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.002, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.003, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.004, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.005, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.006)


inside <- full_join(inside, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN, by = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "treatment", "year", "tLU_INDEX", "cLU_INDEX"))
inside <- full_join(inside, inside_VERTICAL_WS, by = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "treatment", "year", "tLU_INDEX", "cLU_INDEX"))

rm(inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN, inside_VERTICAL_WS, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.001, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.002, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.003, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.004, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.005, inside_VERTICAL_WS_17.006,  inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.001, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.002, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.003, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.004, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.005, inside_VERTICAL_WS_18.006, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.001, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.002, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.003, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.004, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.005, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.006, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.001, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.002, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.003, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.004, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.005, inside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.006, inside_17.001, inside_17.002, inside_17.003, inside_17.004, inside_17.005, inside_17.006, inside_18.001, inside_18.002, inside_18.003, inside_18.004, inside_18.005, inside_18.006)

## MAKING THETA BUCKETS INSIDE##
calculate_polar <- function(lat, lon) {
  r <- distHaversine(c(-81.21869, 37.57799), c(lon, lat))
  theta <- atan2(lat - 37.57799, lon - -81.21869)
  return(c(r, theta))}
inside <- inside %>% rowwise() %>%
  mutate(polar = list(calculate_polar(Latitude, Longitude)),
         r_km = (polar[1]/1000),
         theta = polar[2]) %>%
  select(-polar) %>% ungroup()
inside <- inside %>% mutate(theta_bucket = case_when(theta >= 0 & theta < pi/4 ~ "bucket1",
                                                           theta >= pi/4 & theta < pi/2 ~ "bucket2",
                                                           theta >= pi/2 & theta < 3*pi/4 ~ "bucket3",
                                                           theta >= 3*pi/4 & theta <= pi ~ "bucket4",
                                                           theta < -3*pi/4 & theta >= -pi ~ "bucket5",
                                                           theta < -pi/2 & theta >= -3*pi/4 ~ "bucket6",
                                                           theta < -pi/4 & theta >= -pi/2 ~ "bucket7",
                                                           theta < 0 & theta >= -pi/4 ~ "bucket8"))

## ADDING IN SOIL TYPE & ELEVATION##
nc_whatever <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_control_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever, "XLONG")
elevation <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lat)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    elevation[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever, "HGT", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
soil_type <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lat)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    soil_type[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever, "ISLTYP", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
full_table <- data.frame(
  Longitude = as.vector(lon),
  Latitude = as.vector(lat),
  ELEVATION = as.vector(elevation),
  SOIL.TYPE = as.vector(soil_type))
nc_close(nc_whatever)
rm(lat, lon, elevation, soil_type)
full_table <- full_table %>%
  mutate(SOIL.TYPE = ifelse(SOIL.TYPE %in% c(2,8,11,14,16), 1, SOIL.TYPE)) %>% 
  mutate(SOIL.TYPE = recode(SOIL.TYPE, '1' = "Other", '3' = "Sandy Loam", '4' = "Silt Loam", '6' = "Loam"))
prop.table(table(full_table$SOIL.TYPE))

full_table2 <- full_table %>% mutate(Latitude = round(Latitude, 4), Longitude = round(Longitude, 4))

inside <- inside %>% mutate(Latitude = round(Latitude, 4), Longitude = round(Longitude, 4))

inside <- full_join(inside, full_table2, by = c("Latitude", "Longitude"))
inside <- inside %>% filter(!is.na(Mean_CTRL_ET))

## CREATING NORM() REGRESSIONS
inside <- inside %>% mutate(normalized_ctrl_SW = Mean_CTRL_SWDOWN / mean(Mean_CTRL_SWDOWN, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                            normalized_ctrl_GT = Mean_CTRL_GT / mean(Mean_CTRL_GT, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                            normalized_ctrl_VPD = Mean_CTRL_VPD / mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                            normalized_ctrl_SM = Mean_CTRL_SMOIS / mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                            normalized_ctrl_ET = Mean_CTRL_ET / mean(Mean_CTRL_ET, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                            normalized_ctrl_PRCP = Mean_CTRL_RAINNC / mean(Mean_CTRL_RAINNC, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                            normalized_ctrl_W = Mean_CTRL_W / mean(Mean_CTRL_W, na.rm = TRUE) - 1)
```


## CONSTRUCTING OUTSIDE DATA FRAME

```{r}
outside_luc1.17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.001_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1)
outside_luc2.17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.002_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2)
outside_luc3.17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.003_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3)
outside_luc4.17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.004_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4)
outside_luc5.17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.005_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5)
outside_luc6.17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.006_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6)
outside_luc1.18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.001_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1)
outside_luc2.18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.002_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2)
outside_luc3.18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.003_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3)
outside_luc4.18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.004_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4)
outside_luc5.18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.005_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5)
outside_luc6.18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.006_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6)
outside <- bind_rows(outside_luc1.17, outside_luc2.17, outside_luc3.17, outside_luc4.17, outside_luc5.17, outside_luc6.17,
                    outside_luc1.18, outside_luc2.18, outside_luc3.18, outside_luc4.18, outside_luc5.18, outside_luc6.18)

outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.001_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.002_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.003_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.004_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.005_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_18.006_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6) %>% select(-X)

outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.001_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.002_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.003_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.004_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.005_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/remaining_deciduous/December2025_17.006_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6) %>% select(-X)
outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN <- bind_rows(outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.001, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.002, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.003, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.004, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.005, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.006, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.001, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.002, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.003, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.004, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.005, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.006)


outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.001_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.002_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.003_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.004_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.005_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_18.006_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)

outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.001 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.001_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.002 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.002_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.003 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.003_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.004 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.004_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.005 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.005_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.006 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.006_deciduous_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, treatment, year, tLU_INDEX, cLU_INDEX, Mean_CTRL_W, Mean_t00X_W, delta_W_t00X)
outside_VERTICAL_WS <- bind_rows(outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.001, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.002, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.003, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.004, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.005, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.006, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.001, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.002, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.003, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.004, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.005, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.006)


outside <- full_join(outside, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN, by = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "treatment", "year", "tLU_INDEX", "cLU_INDEX"))
outside <- full_join(outside, outside_VERTICAL_WS, by = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "treatment", "year", "tLU_INDEX", "cLU_INDEX"))


rm(outside_luc1.17, outside_luc2.17, outside_luc3.17, outside_luc4.17, outside_luc5.17, outside_luc6.17, outside_luc1.18, outside_luc2.18, outside_luc3.18, outside_luc4.18, outside_luc5.18, outside_luc6.18, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.001, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.002, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.003, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.004, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.005, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_18.006, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.001, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.002, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.003, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.004, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.005, outside_ALBEDO_SWDOWN_17.006, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.001, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.002, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.003, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.004, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.005, outside_VERTICAL_WS_18.006, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.001, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.002, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.003, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.004, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.005, outside_VERTICAL_WS_17.006)

## MASKING OUT INTERSTITIAL PIXELS IN SCENARIOS 3 AND 4 ##

mask003 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.17999, -81.60565, -82.27844, -82.25146, -80.82397, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.80225, 36.78333, 36.80656, 37.34526, 38.37086, 38.33989))
mask004 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.18411, -81.46793, -82.2084, -82.17819, -80.89255, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.74847, 36.83211, 36.85827, 37.4508, 38.37374, 38.33989))
mask003_sf <- st_polygon(list(as.matrix(mask003))) %>% st_sfc(crs = 4326)
mask004_sf <- st_polygon(list(as.matrix(mask004))) %>% st_sfc(crs = 4326)
outside_sf <- st_as_sf(outside, coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = 4326)
inside_003 <- st_within(outside_sf, mask003_sf, sparse = FALSE)[,1]
inside_004 <- st_within(outside_sf, mask004_sf, sparse = FALSE)[,1]

keep_point <- case_when(outside_sf$treatment == 3 ~ !inside_003, outside_sf$treatment == 4 ~ !inside_004, TRUE ~ TRUE)
outside_sf <- outside_sf %>% ungroup()
outside_filtered <- outside_sf[keep_point, ] %>% mutate(Longitude = st_coordinates(.)[,1], Latitude = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% filter(delta_VT_t00X <= 1, delta_VT_t00X >= -1)

rm(mask003, mask003_sf, mask004, mask004_sf, outside_sf)

## MAKING DISTANCE TO DEFORESTATION COLUMN ##
lu_coords <- sprintf("./data/csvs/lat_lons/17_%03d_lat_lon.csv", 1:6)
acsvs_17 <- lapply(lu_coords, read.csv)
csv1 <- acsvs_17[[1]] %>% mutate(t00X_index = row_number(), treatment = 1)
csv2 <- acsvs_17[[2]] %>% mutate(t00X_index = row_number(), treatment = 2)
csv3 <- acsvs_17[[3]] %>% mutate(t00X_index = row_number(), treatment = 3)
csv4 <- acsvs_17[[4]] %>% mutate(t00X_index = row_number(), treatment = 4)
csv5 <- acsvs_17[[5]] %>% mutate(t00X_index = row_number(), treatment = 5)
csv6 <- acsvs_17[[6]] %>% mutate(t00X_index = row_number(), treatment = 6)
lu_16_t001 <- csv1 %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 16) %>% filter(!(t00X_index == 2390)) %>% select(Longitude, Latitude)
lu_16_t002 <- csv2 %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 16) %>% filter(!(t00X_index == 2381)) %>% select(Longitude, Latitude)
lu_16_t003 <- csv3 %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 16) %>% filter(!(t00X_index == 2379)) %>% select(Longitude, Latitude)
lu_16_t004 <- csv4 %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 16) %>% filter(!(t00X_index == 2381)) %>% select(Longitude, Latitude)
lu_16_t005 <- csv5 %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 16) %>% select(Longitude, Latitude)
lu_16_t006 <- csv6 %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 16) %>% filter(!(t00X_index == 2389)) %>% select(Longitude, Latitude)
csv1$distance_to_LU16_meters <- apply(csv1[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 1, function(coord) {
  min(distHaversine(coord, lu_16_t001))})
csv2$distance_to_LU16_meters <- apply(csv2[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 1, function(coord) {
  min(distHaversine(coord, lu_16_t002))})
csv3$distance_to_LU16_meters <- apply(csv3[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 1, function(coord) {
  min(distHaversine(coord, lu_16_t003))})
csv4$distance_to_LU16_meters <- apply(csv4[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 1, function(coord) {
  min(distHaversine(coord, lu_16_t004))})
csv5$distance_to_LU16_meters <- apply(csv5[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 1, function(coord) {
  min(distHaversine(coord, lu_16_t005))})
csv6$distance_to_LU16_meters <- apply(csv6[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 1, function(coord) {
  min(distHaversine(coord, lu_16_t006))})
distance_csvs <- bind_rows(csv1, csv2, csv3, csv4, csv5, csv6)
distance_csvs <- distance_csvs %>% filter(LU_INDEX == 4) %>% select(-LU_INDEX, -t00X_index)
outside_filtered <- full_join(outside_filtered, distance_csvs, by = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "treatment"))
outside_filtered <- outside_filtered %>% filter(!is.na(X)) %>% mutate(distance_to_LU16_km = distance_to_LU16_meters / 1000)
rm(acsvs_17, csv1, csv2, csv3, csv4, csv5, csv6, lu_16_t001, lu_16_t002, lu_16_t003, lu_16_t004, lu_16_t005, lu_16_t006, distance_csvs)

## MAKING THETA BUCKETS ##
calculate_polar <- function(lat, lon) {
  r <- distHaversine(c(-81.21869, 37.57799), c(lon, lat))
  theta <- atan2(lat - 37.57799, lon - -81.21869)
  return(c(r, theta))}
outside_filtered <- outside_filtered %>% rowwise() %>%
  mutate(polar = list(calculate_polar(Latitude, Longitude)),
         r = polar[1],
         theta = polar[2]) %>%
  select(-polar) %>% ungroup()
outside_filtered <- outside_filtered %>% mutate(theta_bucket = case_when(theta >= 0 & theta < pi/4 ~ "bucket1",
                                                           theta >= pi/4 & theta < pi/2 ~ "bucket2",
                                                           theta >= pi/2 & theta < 3*pi/4 ~ "bucket3",
                                                           theta >= 3*pi/4 & theta <= pi ~ "bucket4",
                                                           theta < -3*pi/4 & theta >= -pi ~ "bucket5",
                                                           theta < -pi/2 & theta >= -3*pi/4 ~ "bucket6",
                                                           theta < -pi/4 & theta >= -pi/2 ~ "bucket7",
                                                           theta < 0 & theta >= -pi/4 ~ "bucket8"))

## CREATING NORM() REGRESSIONS
outside_filtered <- outside_filtered %>% mutate(normalized_ctrl_GPP = Mean_CTRL_PSN / mean(Mean_CTRL_PSN, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                                                normalized_ctrl_APAR = Mean_CTRL_APAR / mean(Mean_CTRL_APAR, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                                                normalized_ctrl_SM = Mean_CTRL_SMOIS / mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS) - 1,
                                                normalized_ctrl_VPD = Mean_CTRL_VPD / mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD, na.rm = TRUE) - 1,
                                                normalized_ctrl_VT = Mean_CTRL_VT / mean(Mean_CTRL_VT, na.rm = TRUE) - 1)
```


## Import CSVs with complete CTRL data

```{r import_data}
## FULL CTRL DATA ##
## (1) Mean_CTRL_VT >= 273 (done in RDS to CSV script)
## (2) PSN > 2 (done below)
## SO, AFTER REMOVING "FROZEN," "DEAD" POINTS:

ctrl_17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/all_points/December2025_17.001_all_points.csv") %>% filter(Mean_CTRL_PSN > 2)
ctrl_18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/all_points/December2025_18.001_all_points.csv") %>% filter(Mean_CTRL_PSN > 2)



```


## New Figure 1)

Figs. 2.1-2.3 can be combined into 1 4 panel figure – this provides all the background/context

```{r}
selected_states2 <- states %>% 
  filter(NAME %in% c("Ohio", "Kentucky", "North Carolina", "Virginia", "West Virginia", "Tennessee","Michigan","Wisconsin","Pennsylvania",
                     "Iowa","Illinois","Missouri","Indiana","Minnesota","Maryland","New York","Arkansas","Louisiana",
                     "South Carolina","Georgia","Mississippi","Alabama","Florida","Delaware","New Jersey"))
clipped_physiographic2 <- st_intersection(physiographic, selected_states2)
syn_box_coords <- data.frame(long = c(-92.953, -74.427, -76.228, -91.634, -92.953),
                             lat = c(43.556, 43.191, 29.951, 30.264, 43.556))
inside_regions2 <- st_intersection(clipped_physiographic2, box_polygon)
outside_regions2 <- st_difference(clipped_physiographic2, box_polygon)
syn_box_polygon <- st_polygon(list(cbind(syn_box_coords$long, syn_box_coords$lat))) %>% 
  st_sfc(crs = st_crs(clipped_physiographic2))
inside_syn_regions <- st_intersection(clipped_physiographic2, syn_box_polygon)
outside_syn_regions <- st_difference(clipped_physiographic2, syn_box_polygon)
outside_regions2 <- st_difference(outside_syn_regions, box_polygon)
inside_syn_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Blues"))(length(unique(inside_syn_regions$PROVINCE)))
inside_colors2 <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(4, "Greens"))(length(unique(inside_regions2$PROVINCE)))
outside_colors2 <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Reds"))(length(unique(outside_regions2$PROVINCE)))
inside_palette2 <- setNames(inside_colors2, unique(inside_regions2$PROVINCE))
inside_syn_palette <- setNames(inside_syn_colors, unique(inside_syn_regions$PROVINCE))
outside_palette2 <- setNames(outside_colors2, unique(outside_regions2$PROVINCE))
inside_syn_regions <- inside_syn_regions %>% mutate(color = inside_syn_palette[PROVINCE]) %>%
  group_by(color) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  ungroup()
inside_regions2 <- inside_regions2 %>% mutate(color = inside_palette2[PROVINCE]) %>%
  group_by(color) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  ungroup()
outside_regions2 <- outside_regions2 %>% mutate(color = "lightgrey") %>%
  group_by(color) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  ungroup()
combined_regions2 <- bind_rows(inside_syn_regions, inside_regions2, outside_regions2)
selected_states2 <- st_transform(selected_states2, crs = 4326)
combined_regions2 <- st_transform(combined_regions2, crs = 4326)
syn_box_polygon <- st_transform(syn_box_polygon, crs = 4326)
syn_box_df <- st_as_sf(syn_box_polygon)
create_great_circle <- function(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) {
  gc <- gcIntermediate(c(lon1, lat1), c(lon2, lat2), n=100, addStartEnd=TRUE, sp=TRUE)
  return(gc)
}
great_circle_lines <- lapply(1:(nrow(syn_box_coords) - 1), function(i) {
  create_great_circle(syn_box_coords$long[i], syn_box_coords$lat[i], syn_box_coords$long[i+1], syn_box_coords$lat[i+1])
})
great_circle_sf <- do.call(rbind, lapply(great_circle_lines, st_as_sf))
green_great_circle_lines <- lapply(1:(nrow(box_coords) - 1), function(i) {
  create_great_circle(box_coords$long[i], box_coords$lat[i], box_coords$long[i+1], box_coords$lat[i+1])
})
green_great_circle_sf <- do.call(rbind, lapply(green_great_circle_lines, st_as_sf))
SynopticDomainMap <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions2, aes(fill = color), color = "black", linewidth = 0, alpha = 1) +
  scale_fill_identity(name = "Physiographic Regions", 
                      breaks = c(inside_palette2, inside_syn_palette), 
                      labels = c(names(inside_palette2), names(inside_syn_palette)), 
                      guide = "legend") +
  geom_sf(data = great_circle_sf, color = "darkblue", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_sf(data = green_great_circle_sf, color = "darkgreen", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_sf(data = selected_states2, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  theme_test() +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  standardized_theme
rm(clipped_physiographic2, combined_regions2, great_circle_lines, great_circle_sf, green_great_circle_lines, green_great_circle_sf, inside_regions2, inside_syn_regions, outside_regions2, outside_syn_regions, selected_states2, syn_box_coords, syn_box_df, syn_box_polygon, inside_colors2, inside_palette2, inside_syn_colors, inside_syn_palette, outside_colors2, create_great_circle, outside_palette2)

nc_whatever_for_landuse <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_control_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever_for_landuse, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever_for_landuse, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lat)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever_for_landuse, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
elevation <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lat)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    elevation[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever_for_landuse, "HGT", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
soil_type <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lat)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    soil_type[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_whatever_for_landuse, "ISLTYP", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
full_table <- data.frame(
  lon = as.vector(lon),
  lat = as.vector(lat),
  LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
  ELEVATION = as.vector(elevation),
  SOIL_TYPE = as.vector(soil_type))
nc_close(nc_whatever_for_landuse)
rm(lat, lon, landuse, elevation, soil_type)
full_table <- full_table %>%
  mutate(SOIL_TYPE = ifelse(SOIL_TYPE %in% c(2,8,11,14,16), 1, SOIL_TYPE)) %>% 
  mutate(SOIL_TYPE = recode(SOIL_TYPE, '1' = "Other", '3' = "Sandy Loam", '4' = "Silt Loam", '6' = "Loam")) %>% 
  mutate(LU_INDEX = ifelse(LU_INDEX %in% c(2,3,5), 1, LU_INDEX)) %>% 
  mutate(LU_INDEX = ifelse(LU_INDEX %in% c(7,8,9,10,11,12,13,14,15,17), 6, LU_INDEX)) %>% 
  mutate(LU_INDEX = recode(LU_INDEX, '1' = "Different Forest Types", '4' = "Deciduous Broadleaf Forest", '6' = "Other LU Types", '16' = "Barren or Sparsely Vegetated"))
prop.table(table(full_table$LU_INDEX))
prop.table(table(full_table$SOIL_TYPE))
MODISpoints <- data.frame(
  lat = c(36.45, 36.45, 36.79, 36.70, 36.5, 36.7, 36.9, 37.18, 37, 38, 37.5, 38.62, 38.25, 37.75, 38.5, 38.25, 37.55, 38.65, 37.378314),
  lon = c(-80.00, -80.76, -80.00, -80.27, -81.75, -81.15, -80.5, -80, -81.5, -80, -82.5, -82.35, -82, -81.5, -81.25, -80.5, -80.65, -80, -80.524847))

land_use <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = full_table, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = LU_INDEX), shape = 15, size = 0.85) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Different Forest Types" = "#4361EE",
                                "Deciduous Broadleaf Forest" = "#80ED99",
                                "Other LU Types" = "#F28482", 
                                "Barren or Sparsely Vegetated" = "black"), name = NULL) +
  geom_point(data = MODISpoints, aes(x = lon, y = lat, shape = "MODIS Validation Sites"), fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.7) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("MODIS Validation Sites" = 21)) +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(title = NULL, override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  theme_test() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  standardized_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"), 
  legend.text = element_text(size = 8)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 4, override.aes = list(size = 5)))
elevation <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = full_table, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = ELEVATION), shape = 15, size = 0.85) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "oslo", name = expression("Elev. (m)")) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "red", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  theme_test() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  standardized_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 8))
soil_type <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = full_table, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = SOIL_TYPE), shape = 15, size = 0.85) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Sandy Loam" = "#EFC457",
                                "Silt Loam" = "#98710F",
                                "Loam" = "#653D01", 
                                "Other" = "purple"), name = NULL) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  theme_test() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"), 
  legend.text = element_text(size = 8)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, override.aes = list(size = 5)))

figs_234 <- ggarrange(elevation, soil_type, land_use, nrow = 1, ncol = 3, align = "hv")
#ggsave("2figs_234.pdf", figs_234, width = 15, height = 7, units = "in")
rm(lat, lon, landuse, land_use, MODISpoints, elevation, full_table, nc_whatever_for_landuse, soil_type)
```


## New Figure 2)

Figs. 2.4 and 2.5 can be combined into a nice 4 panel as well – this conveys all the mechanism, parameters, validation for GPP

```{r}
modis_gpp_list <- list()
model_1_gpp_list <- list()
model_2_gpp_list <- list()
desired_number_of_files <- 19
for (i in 1:desired_number_of_files) {
  modis_file <- sprintf("./data/gpp_validation/modis_point_%03d.csv", i)
  model_file_1 <- sprintf("./data/gpp_validation/pre_validation_%03d.csv", i)
  model_file_2 <- sprintf("./data/gpp_validation/validation%03d.csv", i)
  modis_data <- read.csv(modis_file) %>%
    dplyr::select(calendar_date, value) %>%
    mutate(calendar_date = as.Date(calendar_date), GPP_MODIS = value * 1e-4) %>%
    group_by(calendar_date) %>%
    summarise(!!paste0("average_gpp_", sprintf("%03d", i)) := mean(GPP_MODIS, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(time = as.POSIXct(calendar_date, format="%Y-%m-%d", tz="UTC")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-calendar_date)
  model_data_1 <- read.csv(model_file_1) %>%
    mutate(fixtimes = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz="UTC"), GPP_model_1_kg_per_s = GPP * 1e-3)
  start_date_2017 <- as.POSIXct("2017-01-01", tz = "UTC")
  model_data_1_2017_8day <- model_data_1 %>%
    mutate(time = start_date_2017 + floor(as.numeric(difftime(fixtimes, start_date_2017, units = "days")) / 8) * 8 * 86400) %>%
    group_by(time) %>%
    summarize(!!paste0("Model_1_kg_per_8days_", sprintf("%03d", i)) := sum(GPP_model_1_kg_per_s * 3600, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    slice(-c(1,n()))
  start_date_2018 <- as.POSIXct("2018-01-01", tz = "UTC")
  model_data_1_2018_8day <- model_data_1 %>%
    mutate(time = start_date_2018 + floor(as.numeric(difftime(fixtimes, start_date_2018, units = "days")) / 8) * 8 * 86400) %>%
    group_by(time) %>%
    summarize(!!paste0("Model_1_kg_per_8days_", sprintf("%03d", i)) := sum(GPP_model_1_kg_per_s * 3600, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    slice(-c(1,n()))
  model_data_2 <- read.csv(model_file_2) %>%
    mutate(fixtimes = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz="UTC"), GPP_model_2_kg_per_s = GPP * 1e-3)
  start_date_2017 <- as.POSIXct("2017-01-01", tz = "UTC")
  model_data_2_2017_8day <- model_data_2 %>%
    mutate(time = start_date_2017 + floor(as.numeric(difftime(fixtimes, start_date_2017, units = "days")) / 8) * 8 * 86400) %>%
    group_by(time) %>%
    summarize(!!paste0("Model_2_kg_per_8days_", sprintf("%03d", i)) := sum(GPP_model_2_kg_per_s * 3600, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    slice(-c(1,n()))
  start_date_2018 <- as.POSIXct("2018-01-01", tz = "UTC")
  model_data_2_2018_8day <- model_data_2 %>%
    mutate(time = start_date_2018 + floor(as.numeric(difftime(fixtimes, start_date_2018, units = "days")) / 8) * 8 * 86400) %>%
    group_by(time) %>%
    summarize(!!paste0("Model_2_kg_per_8days_", sprintf("%03d", i)) := sum(GPP_model_2_kg_per_s * 3600, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
    slice(-c(1,n()))
  modis_gpp_list[[i]] <- modis_data
  model_1_gpp_list[[i]] <- bind_rows(model_data_1_2017_8day, model_data_1_2018_8day)
  model_2_gpp_list[[i]] <- bind_rows(model_data_2_2017_8day, model_data_2_2018_8day)
}
modis_data_all <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "time", all = TRUE), modis_gpp_list)
model_1_data_all <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "time", all = TRUE), model_1_gpp_list)
model_2_data_all <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "time", all = TRUE), model_2_gpp_list)
merged_data <- merge(modis_data_all, model_1_data_all, by = "time", all = TRUE)
merged_data <- merge(merged_data, model_2_data_all, by = "time", all = TRUE)
average_modis_gpp <- merged_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("average_gpp_"), names_to = "variable", values_to = "gpp_value") %>%
  group_by(time) %>%
  summarise(average_modis_gpp = mean(gpp_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
average_modeled_gpp_1 <- merged_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Model_1_kg_per_8days_"),names_to = "variable", values_to = "gpp_value") %>%
  group_by(time) %>%
  summarise(average_modeled_gpp_1 = mean(gpp_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
average_modeled_gpp_2 <- merged_data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Model_2_kg_per_8days_"),names_to = "variable", values_to = "gpp_value") %>%
  group_by(time) %>%
  summarise(average_modeled_gpp_2 = mean(gpp_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
final_data <- merged_data %>%
  left_join(average_modis_gpp, by = "time") %>%
  left_join(average_modeled_gpp_1, by = "time") %>%
  left_join(average_modeled_gpp_2, by = "time") %>%
  mutate(time = as.Date(time))
final_data <- na.omit(final_data)

time_plot3 <- ggplot(final_data) +
  geom_line(aes(x = time, y = average_modis_gpp, color = "MODIS"), linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_line(aes(x = time, y = average_modeled_gpp_1, color = "Initial Param."), linewidth = 0.65) +
  geom_line(aes(x = time, y = average_modeled_gpp_2, color = "Modified Param."), linewidth = 0.65) +
  labs(x = "Date",
       y = expression("GPP " * "(" * kg ~ C ~ m^{-2} * " per 8 days" * ")")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("MODIS" = "skyblue", "Initial Param." = "tomato", "Modified Param." = "forestgreen"), name = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  xlim(as.Date("2017-01-01"), as.Date("2018-11-02")) +
  ylim(0, 0.11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
#ggsave("fig_2_plot_sheet.pdf", time_plot3, width = 5, height = 5, units = "in")

##########


```


## New Figure 3)

Maybe the scenarios could be squeezed into a 1x6, to save some space?

```{r}
nc_17_001 <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_t001_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_17_001, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_17_001, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lon)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_17_001, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
nc_close(nc_17_001)
LU_graphable.1 <- data.frame(lon = as.vector(lon),
                             lat = as.vector(lat),
                             LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
                             Treatment = "Scenario 1")

nc_17_002 <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_t002_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_17_002, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_17_002, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lon)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_17_002, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
nc_close(nc_17_002)
LU_graphable.2 <- data.frame(lon = as.vector(lon),
                             lat = as.vector(lat),
                             LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
                             Treatment = "Scenario 2")

nc_17_003 <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_t003_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_17_003, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_17_003, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lon)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_17_003, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
nc_close(nc_17_003)
LU_graphable.3 <- data.frame(lon = as.vector(lon),
                             lat = as.vector(lat),
                             LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
                             Treatment = "Scenario 3")

nc_17_004 <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_t004_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_17_004, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_17_004, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lon)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_17_004, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
nc_close(nc_17_004)
LU_graphable.4 <- data.frame(lon = as.vector(lon),
                             lat = as.vector(lat),
                             LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
                             Treatment = "Scenario 4")


nc_17_005 <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_t005_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_17_005, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_17_005, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lon)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_17_005, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
nc_close(nc_17_005)
LU_graphable.5 <- data.frame(lon = as.vector(lon),
                             lat = as.vector(lat),
                             LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
                             Treatment = "Scenario 5")

nc_17_006 <- nc_open("./data/netCDF_files/wrfout_2017_t006_domain.nc")
lat <- ncvar_get(nc_17_006, "XLAT")
lon <- ncvar_get(nc_17_006, "XLONG")
landuse <- matrix(0, nrow = dim(lat)[1], ncol = dim(lon)[2])
for (i in 1:100) {
  for (j in 1:100) {
    landuse[i, j] <- ncvar_get(nc_17_006, "LU_INDEX", start = c(i, j, 1), count = c(1, 1, 1))
  }
}
nc_close(nc_17_006)
LU_graphable.6 <- data.frame(lon = as.vector(lon),
                             lat = as.vector(lat),
                             LU_INDEX = as.vector(landuse),
                             Treatment = "Scenario 6")

LU_maps <- bind_rows(LU_graphable.1, LU_graphable.2, LU_graphable.3, LU_graphable.4, LU_graphable.5, LU_graphable.6)
rm(LU_graphable.1, LU_graphable.2, LU_graphable.3, LU_graphable.4, LU_graphable.5, LU_graphable.6)


LU_maps <- LU_maps %>%
  mutate(LU_INDEX = ifelse(LU_INDEX %in% c(2,3,5), 1, LU_INDEX)) %>% 
  mutate(LU_INDEX = ifelse(LU_INDEX %in% c(7,8,9,10,11,12,13,14,15,17), 6, LU_INDEX)) %>% 
  mutate(LU_INDEX = recode(LU_INDEX, '1' = "Different Forest Types", '4' = "Deciduous Broadleaf Forest", '6' = "Other LU Types", '16' = "Barren or Sparsely Vegetated"))

LU_maps_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = LU_maps, aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = LU_INDEX), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Different Forest Types" = "#4361EE",
                                "Deciduous Broadleaf Forest" = "#80ED99",
                                "Other LU Types" = "#F28482", 
                                "Barren or Sparsely Vegetated" = "black"), name = NULL) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "purple", linewidth = 0.01, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "grey", linewidth = 0.03, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_wrap(~ Treatment, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = 10)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 6)))


#ggsave("~/Desktop/FIG3_test.pdf", LU_maps_plot, width = 11.25, height = 2.5, units = "in")


```


## New Figure 4)
Make an 8 panel map figure, with VPD, SW, SM, and GPP; this is probably pretty important for motivating linear models and Fig. 3.20.

```{r}
require(data.table)
require(ggnewscale)
require(patchwork)

## FULL CTRL DATA ##
## (1) Mean_CTRL_VT >= 273 (done in RDS to CSV script)
## (2) PSN > 2 (done below)
## SO, AFTER REMOVING "FROZEN," "DEAD" POINTS:

ctrl_17 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/all_points/December2025_17.001_all_points.csv") %>% filter(Mean_CTRL_PSN > 2)
ctrl_18 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/all_points/December2025_18.001_all_points.csv") %>% filter(Mean_CTRL_PSN > 2)

fig_4_df_17 <- ctrl_17 %>% mutate(Year = 2017) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, Year, Mean_CTRL_VT, Mean_CTRL_SMOIS, Mean_CTRL_APAR, Mean_CTRL_VPD, Mean_CTRL_PSN) %>% reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "Year"), variable.name = "variable", value.name = "value")
fig_4_df_18 <- ctrl_18 %>% mutate(Year = 2018) %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, Year, Mean_CTRL_VT, Mean_CTRL_SMOIS, Mean_CTRL_APAR, Mean_CTRL_VPD, Mean_CTRL_PSN) %>% reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Latitude", "Longitude", "Year"), variable.name = "variable", value.name = "value")
fig_4_df <- full_join(fig_4_df_17, fig_4_df_18)

fig_4_df <- fig_4_df %>% mutate(variable = recode(variable, 'Mean_CTRL_VT' = "Veg Temp (K)", 'Mean_CTRL_SMOIS' = "SM (m3/m3)", 'Mean_CTRL_APAR' = "APAR (W/m2)", 'Mean_CTRL_VPD' = "VPD (Pa)", 'Mean_CTRL_PSN' = "GPP (umol/m2/s-1)"))


palettes <- c("Veg Temp (K)"        = "roma",
              "SM (m3/m3)"          = "oslo",
              "APAR (W/m2)"         = "lajolla",
              "VPD (Pa)"            = "batlow",
              "GPP (umol/m2/s-1)"   = "tokyo")

legend_labels <- c("Veg Temp (K)"        = "VegTemp",
                   "SM (m3/m3)"          = "SM",
                   "APAR (W/m2)"         = "APAR",
                   "VPD (Pa)"            = "VPD",
                   "GPP (umol/m2/s-1)"   = "GPP")

ctrls <- ggplot()
for (c in unique(fig_4_df$variable)) {
  df <- fig_4_df %>% filter(variable == c)
  ctrls <- ctrls + new_scale_color() + geom_point(data = df, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = value), shape = 15, size = 0.25) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = palettes[c], direction = ifelse(palettes[c] %in% c("roma", "oslo"), -1, 1), name = paste(legend_labels[c]))
}
ctrl_plot <- ctrls +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(Year ~ variable) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  standardized_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.width = unit(0.62, "cm"), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank())


#ggsave("~/Desktop/new_ctrl_figure.pdf", ctrl_plot, width = 10, height = 4.5, units = "in")


```




######### PLOTS #########


## BIG BEAUTIFUL PLOT (+ Delta GPP Plot)

```{r}
range(outside_filtered$delta_VPD_t00X) ## -93, 93
range(outside_filtered$delta_VT_t00X) ## -0.91, 0.91
range(outside_filtered$delta_SMOIS_t00X) ## -0.03, 0.03 ## -0.032, 0.032
range(outside_filtered$delta_APAR_t00X) ## -4.60, 4.60
range(outside_filtered$delta_PSN_t00X) ## -0.91, 0.91 ## -0.98, 0.98

range(inside$delta_VPD_t00X) ## -93, 93
range(inside$delta_GT_t00X) ## -0.91, 0.91
range(inside$delta_SMOIS_t00X) ## -0.03, 0.03 ## -0.032, 0.032
range(inside$delta_SWDOWN_t00X) ## -4.60, 4.60
range(inside$delta_PSN_t00X) ## -0.91, 0.91 ## -0.98, 0.98


mask001 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.17999, -81.60565, -82.27844, -82.25146, -80.82397, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.80225, 36.78333, 36.80656, 37.34526, 38.37086, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 1)
mask002 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.15515, -82.00928, -82.27844, -82.26770, -80.41260, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 38.12488, 36.79769, 36.80656, 37.02207, 38.35271, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 2)
mask003 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.17999, -81.60565, -82.27844, -82.25146, -80.82397, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.80225, 36.78333, 36.80656, 37.34526, 38.37086, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 3)
mask004 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.18411, -81.46793, -82.2084, -82.17819, -80.89255, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.74847, 36.83211, 36.85827, 37.4508, 38.37374, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 4)
mask005 <- data.frame(long = c(-82.19644, -81.51001, -80.22095, -80.26138, -80.93329, -82.22415, -82.19644),
                      lat = c(38.42185, 38.39818, 37.26431, 36.72611, 36.75651, 37.88371, 38.42185),
                      treatment = 5)
mask006 <- data.frame(long = c(-82.19644, -81.92181, -80.24530, -80.26138, -80.53009, -82.26758, -82.19644),
                      lat = c(38.42185, 38.41282, 36.94141, 36.72611, 36.73870, 38.20664, 38.42185),
                      treatment = 6)
masks <- bind_rows(mask001, mask002, mask003, mask004, mask005, mask006)

X.VPD <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_VPD_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_VPD_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("Pa"), limits = range(c(-93, 93))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("c) " * Delta * "VPD")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

X.VT <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_VT_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_GT_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("K"), limits = range(c(-0.91, 0.91))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("b) " * Delta * "GT (inside) and " * Delta * "VT (outside)")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

X.SM <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_SMOIS_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_SMOIS_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("m3/m3"), limits = range(c(-0.038, 0.038)), breaks = (c(-0.015, 0.015))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("d) " * Delta * "SM")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

X.APAR <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_APAR_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_SWDOWN_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("W/m2"), limits = range(c(-4.60, 4.60))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("a) " * Delta * "SW (inside) and " * Delta * "APAR (outside)")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

full_6789 <- ggarrange(X.APAR, X.VT, X.VPD, X.SM, ncol = 1)

#ggsave("~/Desktop/full_corrected.pdf", full_6789, width = 14.5, height = 19, units = "in")

average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_17 <- mean(ctrl_17$Mean_CTRL_RAINNC) * 234
average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_18 <- mean(ctrl_18$Mean_CTRL_RAINNC) * 234

average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_18-average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_17

percent_difference <- (average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_18-average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_17) / ((average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_18+average_precip_deciduous_CTRL_17)/2)*100

X.GPP <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_PSN_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("GPP (umol co2/m2/s)"), limits = range(c(-0.98, 0.98))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

#ggsave("~/Desktop/X.GPP_corrected.pdf", X.GPP, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
```


## Environmental Context Dot Plot (Inside and Outside):

```{r}
## OUTSIDE
gpp.mod.carter <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_GPP:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family="gaussian")
sm.mod.carter <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_SM:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family="gaussian")
vpd.mod.carter <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_VPD:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family="gaussian")
vt.mod.carter <- glm(delta_VT_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_VT:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family="gaussian")
apar.mod.carter <- glm(delta_APAR_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_APAR:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family="gaussian")

outside_filtered2 <- outside_filtered %>% filter(year == 2017, treatment == 1)
lm(outside_filtered2$delta_VPD_t00X ~ outside_filtered2$normalized_ctrl_VPD)

make_awful_carter_table <- function(fit, var){
  cf  <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  idx <- grep("normalized_ctrl", rownames(cf))
  trm <- rownames(cf)[idx]
  data.frame(variable = var,
             year = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(year\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             treatment = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             p_val = cf[idx, 4],
             slope = cf[idx, 1],
             row.names = NULL)
}

gpp.mod.carter.mods <- make_awful_carter_table(gpp.mod.carter, "GPP")
sm.mod.carter.mods <- make_awful_carter_table(sm.mod.carter, "SM")
vpd.mod.carter.mods <- make_awful_carter_table(vpd.mod.carter, "VPD")
vt.mod.carter.mods <- make_awful_carter_table(vt.mod.carter, "VT")
apar.mod.carter.mods <- make_awful_carter_table(apar.mod.carter, "APAR")

all_mods_table_carter <- bind_rows(gpp.mod.carter.mods, sm.mod.carter.mods, vpd.mod.carter.mods, vt.mod.carter.mods, apar.mod.carter.mods) %>% 
  mutate(p_val = ifelse(p_val > 0.01, NA, p_val))

range(gpp.mod.carter.mods$slope) #-0.219, 0.219
range(sm.mod.carter.mods$slope) #-0.00372, 0.00372
range(vpd.mod.carter.mods$slope) #-33.57, 33.57
range(vt.mod.carter.mods$slope) #-5.17, 5.17
range(apar.mod.carter.mods$slope) #-3.51, 3.51

mods_graph_legend_labels_carter <- c("APAR" = "APAR", "GPP" = "GPP", "SM" = "SM", "VPD" = "VPD", "VT" = "VT")

scico_lims_carter <- list("APAR" = c(-3.51, 3.51),
                   "GPP" = c(-0.219, 0.219),
                   "SM" = c(-0.00372, 0.00372),
                   "VPD" = c(-33.57, 33.57),
                   "VT" = c(-5.17, 5.17))

scico_breaks_carter <- list("APAR" = c(-2, 0, 2),
                   "GPP" = c(-0.1, 0, 0.1),
                   "SM" = c(-0.002, 0.002),
                   "VPD" = c(-15, 0, 15),
                   "VT" = c(-2.5, 0, 2.5))

mods_graph_carter <- ggplot()
for (g in unique(all_mods_table_carter$variable)) {
  df <- all_mods_table_carter %>% filter(variable == g)
  mods_graph_carter <- mods_graph_carter + new_scale_color() + geom_point(data = df, aes(x = treatment, y = as.factor(year), color = slope, size = pmin(-log10(p_val), 10))) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = paste(mods_graph_legend_labels_carter[g]), direction = -1, limits = scico_lims_carter[[g]], breaks = scico_breaks_carter[[g]])
}
save_mods_graph_carter <- mods_graph_carter + 
  facet_wrap( ~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(x = "Deforestation Scenario", y = "Year", size = NULL, title = "b) Outside Environmental Variables") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.width = unit(0.62, "cm"), strip.text = element_text(size = 14), plot.title = element_text(size = 16))



## INSIDE
def2_glm_SW <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_SW:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def2_glm_GT <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_GT:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def2_glm_VPD <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_VPD:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def2_glm_SM <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_SM:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def2_glm_ET <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_ET:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def2_glm_PRCP <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_PRCP:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def2_glm_W <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ 0 + as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + normalized_ctrl_W:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")

make_awful_carter_table_def2 <- function(fit, var){
  cf  <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  idx <- grep("normalized_ctrl", rownames(cf))
  trm <- rownames(cf)[idx]
  data.frame(variable = var,
             year = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(year\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             treatment = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             p_val = cf[idx, 4],
             slope = cf[idx, 1],
             row.names = NULL)
}

def2_GT.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_GT, "GT")
def2_VPD.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_VPD, "VPD")
def2_SW.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_SW, "SW")
def2_SM.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_SM, "SM")
def2_ET.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_ET, "ET")
def2_PRCP.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_PRCP, "PRCP")
def2_W.mods <- make_awful_carter_table_def2(def2_glm_W, "W")

all_mods_table_def2 <- bind_rows(def2_GT.mods, def2_VPD.mods, def2_SW.mods, def2_SM.mods, def2_ET.mods, def2_PRCP.mods, def2_W.mods) %>% 
  mutate(p_val = ifelse(p_val > 0.01, NA, p_val))

range(def2_GT.mods$slope) #-138.63, 138.63
range(def2_VPD.mods$slope) #-281, 281
range(def2_SW.mods$slope) #-67.03, 67.03
range(def2_SM.mods$slope) #-0.105, 0.105
range(def2_ET.mods$slope) #-6.95e-05, 6.95e-05
range(def2_PRCP.mods$slope) #-0.969, 0.969
range(def2_W.mods$slope) #-0.0110, 0.0110


mods_graph_legend_labels_def2 <- c("GT" = "GT", "VPD" = "VPD", "SW" = "SW", "SM" = "SM", "ET" = "ET", "PRCP" = "PRCP", "W" = "W")

#var_temp <- all_mods_table$variable == "SM"
#range(all_mods_table$slope[var_temp])

scico_lims2 <- list("GT" = c(-138.63, 138.63),
                   "VPD" = c(-281, 281),
                   "SW" = c(-67.03, 67.03),
                   "SM" = c(-0.105, 0.105),
                   "ET" = c(-6.95e-05, 6.95e-05),
                   "PRCP" = c(-0.969, 0.969),
                   "W" = c(-0.0110, 0.0110))

scico_breaks2 <- list("GT" = c(-65, 65),
                   "VPD" = c(-150, 150),
                   "SW" = c(-50, 50),
                   "SM" = c(-0.06, 0.06),
                   "ET" = c(-5e-05, 5e-05),
                   "PRCP" = c(-0.50, 0.50),
                   "W" = c(-0.006, 0.006))


mods_graph_carter2 <- ggplot()
for (g in unique(all_mods_table_def2$variable)) {
  df <- all_mods_table_def2 %>% filter(variable == g)
  mods_graph_carter2 <- mods_graph_carter2 + new_scale_color() + geom_point(data = df, aes(x = treatment, y = as.factor(year), color = slope, size = pmin(-log10(p_val), 10))) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "bam", name = paste(mods_graph_legend_labels_def2[g]), direction = -1, limits = scico_lims2[[g]], breaks = scico_breaks2[[g]])
}
save_mods_graph_carter_def2 <- mods_graph_carter2 + 
  facet_wrap( ~ variable, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(x = "Deforestation Scenario", y = "Year", size = NULL, title = "a) Inside Environmental Variables") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.width = unit(0.62, "cm"), strip.text = element_text(size = 14), plot.title = element_text(size = 16))
#size = "min(-log10(p),10)"

combined_S1_6 <- ggarrange(save_mods_graph_carter_def2, save_mods_graph_carter, ncol = 1)

#ggsave("~/Desktop/combined_S1_6_NEW.pdf", combined_S1_6, width = 17, height = 6, units = "in")

```


## Spatial Attenuation Dot Plot:

```{r}
glm_SM <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + distance_to_LU16_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family = "gaussian")
glm_VT <- glm(delta_VT_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + distance_to_LU16_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family = "gaussian")
glm_VPD <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + distance_to_LU16_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family = "gaussian")
glm_APAR <- glm(delta_APAR_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + distance_to_LU16_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family = "gaussian")
glm_GPP <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + distance_to_LU16_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), outside_filtered, family = "gaussian")


#test_VPD <- outside_filtered %>% select(delta_VPD_t00X, distance_to_LU16_km, theta_bucket, treatment, year) %>% filter(year == 2017, treatment == 1, theta_bucket == "bucket2")

#ggplot(data = test_VPD) +
#  geom_point(aes(x = distance_to_LU16_km, y = delta_VPD_t00X)) +
#  geom_smooth(aes(x = distance_to_LU16_km, y = delta_VPD_t00X), method = "lm") +
#  theme_bw()

#lm(test_VPD$delta_VPD_t00X ~ test_VPD$distance_to_LU16_km)


make_awful_table <- function(fit, var){
  cf  <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  idx <- grep("distance_to_LU16_km", rownames(cf))
  trm <- rownames(cf)[idx]
  data.frame(theta_bucket = sub(".*theta_bucketbucket([^:]+):.*", "\\1", trm),
             treatment = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             year = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(year\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             variable = var,
             p_val = cf[idx, 4],
             slope = cf[idx, 1],
             row.names = NULL)
}

VT.mods <- make_awful_table(glm_VT, "VT")
VPD.mods <- make_awful_table(glm_VPD, "VPD")
SM.mods <- make_awful_table(glm_SM, "SM")
APAR.mods <- make_awful_table(glm_APAR, "APAR")
GPP.mods <- make_awful_table(glm_GPP, "GPP")

all_mods_table <- bind_rows(VT.mods, VPD.mods, SM.mods, APAR.mods, GPP.mods) %>% 
  mutate(p_val = ifelse(p_val > 0.01, NA, p_val))

all_mods_table <- all_mods_table %>% mutate(theta_bucket2 = recode(theta_bucket, '1' = "ENE", '2' = "NNE", '3' = "NNW", '4' = "WNW", '5' = "WSW", '6' = "SSW", '7' = "SSE", '8' = "ESE"))
all_mods_table$theta_bucket2 <- factor(all_mods_table$theta_bucket2, levels = c("ENE", "NNE", "NNW", "WNW", "WSW", "SSW", "SSE", "ESE"))

range(VT.mods$slope) #-0.00463, 0.00463
range(VPD.mods$slope) #-0.828, 0.828
range(SM.mods$slope) #-0.000202, 0.000202
range(APAR.mods$slope) #-0.0174, 0.0174
range(GPP.mods$slope) #-0.00477, 0.00477


mods_graph_legend_labels <- c("APAR" = "APAR", "GPP" = "GPP", "SM" = "SM", "VPD" = "VPD", "VT" = "VT")

scico_lims <- list("APAR" = c(-0.0174, 0.0174),
                   "GPP" = c(-0.00477, 0.00477),
                   "SM" = c(-0.000202, 0.000202),
                   "VPD" = c(-0.828, 0.828),
                   "VT" = c(-0.00463, 0.00463))

scico_breaks <- list("APAR" = c(-0.01, 0.01),
                   "GPP" = c(-0.0025, 0.0025),
                   "SM" = c(-0.0001, 0.0001),
                   "VPD" = c(-0.41, 0.41),
                   "VT" = c(-0.0023, 0.0023))

#attenuation_intercepts <- function(fit, var){
#  cf  <- summary(fit)$coefficients
#  idx <- grep("theta_bucketbucket.*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\).*as\\.factor\\(year\\)[^:]*$", rownames(cf))
#  trm <- rownames(cf)[idx]
#  data.frame(theta_bucket = sub(".*theta_bucketbucket([^:]+):.*", "\\1", trm),
#             treatment = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
#             year = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(year\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
#             variable = var,
#             p_val = cf[idx, 4],
#             slope = cf[idx, 1],
#             row.names = NULL)
#}

#VT.intercepts <- attenuation_intercepts(glm_VT, "VT")
#VPD.intercepts <- attenuation_intercepts(glm_VPD, "VPD")
#SM.intercepts <- attenuation_intercepts(glm_SM, "SM")
#APAR.intercepts <- attenuation_intercepts(glm_APAR, "APAR")
#GPP.intercepts <- attenuation_intercepts(glm_GPP, "GPP")

#all_intercepts_table <- bind_rows(VT.intercepts, VPD.intercepts, SM.intercepts, APAR.intercepts, GPP.intercepts) %>% 
#  mutate(intercept = slope,
#         intercept = ifelse(p_val > 0.01, NA, intercept),
#         pos_neg_intercept = ifelse(intercept > 0, "+", "-")) %>% select(-slope, -p_val)

#all_mods_table <- left_join(all_mods_table, all_intercepts_table, by = c("theta_bucket", "treatment", "year", "variable"))


mods_graph <- ggplot()
for (g in unique(all_mods_table$variable)) {
  df <- all_mods_table %>% filter(variable == g)
  mods_graph <- mods_graph + new_scale_color() + geom_point(data = df, aes(x = treatment, y = theta_bucket2, size = pmin(-log10(p_val), 10), color = slope)) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = paste(mods_graph_legend_labels[g]), direction = -1, limits = scico_lims[[g]], breaks = scico_breaks[[g]])
}
save_mods_graph <- mods_graph + 
  facet_grid(year ~ variable) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "Deforestation Scenario", size = NULL, y = "Cardinal Direction", color = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.width = unit(0.62, "cm"), strip.text = element_text(size = 16))


#, axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank()

#ggsave("~/Desktop/FIG11_NEW2.pdf", save_mods_graph, width = 14, height = 6.5, units = "in")

```


## BIG BEAUTIFUL PLOT (SUPPLEMENTAL)

```{r}
range(outside_filtered$delta_ALBEDO_t00X)
range(outside_filtered$delta_RAINNC_t00X)
range(outside_filtered$delta_ET_t00X)
range(outside_filtered$delta_W_t00X)

range(inside$delta_ALBEDO_t00X) ## -0.053, 0.053
range(inside$delta_RAINNC_t00X) ## -2.35, 2.35
range(inside$delta_ET_t00X) ## -1.74e-05, 1.74e-05
range(inside$delta_W_t00X) ## -0.172, 0.172


mask001 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.17999, -81.60565, -82.27844, -82.25146, -80.82397, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.80225, 36.78333, 36.80656, 37.34526, 38.37086, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 1)
mask002 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.15515, -82.00928, -82.27844, -82.26770, -80.41260, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 38.12488, 36.79769, 36.80656, 37.02207, 38.35271, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 2)
mask003 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.17999, -81.60565, -82.27844, -82.25146, -80.82397, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.80225, 36.78333, 36.80656, 37.34526, 38.37086, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 3)
mask004 <- data.frame(long = c(-80.13846, -80.18411, -81.46793, -82.2084, -82.17819, -80.89255, -80.13846),
                      lat = c(38.33989, 37.74847, 36.83211, 36.85827, 37.4508, 38.37374, 38.33989),
                      treatment = 4)
mask005 <- data.frame(long = c(-82.19644, -81.51001, -80.22095, -80.26138, -80.93329, -82.22415, -82.19644),
                      lat = c(38.42185, 38.39818, 37.26431, 36.72611, 36.75651, 37.88371, 38.42185),
                      treatment = 5)
mask006 <- data.frame(long = c(-82.19644, -81.92181, -80.24530, -80.26138, -80.53009, -82.26758, -82.19644),
                      lat = c(38.42185, 38.41282, 36.94141, 36.72611, 36.73870, 38.20664, 38.42185),
                      treatment = 6)
masks <- bind_rows(mask001, mask002, mask003, mask004, mask005, mask006)

X.ALBEDO <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_ALBEDO_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_ALBEDO_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("--"), limits = range(c(-0.053, 0.053))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("a) " * Delta * "ALBEDO")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

X.ET <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_ET_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_ET_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("mm s" ^{-1}), limits = range(c(-1.74e-05, 1.74e-05))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("b) " * Delta * "ET")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

X.PRCP <- ggplot() +
```
