```{r}
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_RAINNC_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_RAINNC_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("mm day" ^{-1}), limits = range(c(-2.35, 2.35)), breaks = (c(-1, 1))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("c) " * Delta * "PRCP")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

X.W <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_W_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_W_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", direction = -1, name = expression("m s" ^{-1}), limits = range(c(-0.172, 0.172))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  geom_polygon(data = masks, aes(x = long, y = lat), color = "green", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = expression("d) " * Delta * "W (vertical windspeed)")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "right")

full_6789_supplement <- ggarrange(X.ALBEDO, X.ET, X.PRCP, X.W, ncol = 1)

#ggsave("~/Desktop/full_supplement.pdf", full_6789_supplement, width = 14.5, height = 19, units = "in")
```



===========================================================



######## TABLES ########


## Inside Environmental Characteristics Table

```{r}
inside_data <- inside %>% group_by(year, treatment) %>% summarize(before_VPD = mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD),
                                                                  delta_VPD = mean(delta_VPD_t00X),#(mean(delta_VPD_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_ALBEDO = mean(Mean_CTRL_ALBEDO),
                                                                  delta_ALBEDO = mean(delta_ALBEDO_t00X),#(mean(delta_ALBEDO_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_ALBEDO))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_SWDOWN = mean(Mean_CTRL_SWDOWN),
                                                                  delta_SWDOWN = mean(delta_SWDOWN_t00X),#(mean(delta_SWDOWN_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_SWDOWN))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_GT = mean(Mean_CTRL_GT),
                                                                  delta_GT = mean(delta_GT_t00X),#(mean(delta_GT_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_GT))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_ET = mean(Mean_CTRL_ET),
                                                                  delta_ET = mean(delta_ET_t00X),#(mean(delta_ET_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_ET))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_RAINNC = mean(Mean_CTRL_RAINNC),
                                                                  delta_RAINNC = mean(delta_RAINNC_t00X),#(mean(delta_RAINNC_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_RAINNC))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_SM = mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS),
                                                                  delta_SM = mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X),#(mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_W = mean(Mean_CTRL_W),
                                                                  delta_W = mean(delta_W_t00X),
                                                                  other_delta_W = (mean(delta_W_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_W))*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_WS = sqrt(mean(Mean_CTRL_U)^2 + mean(Mean_CTRL_V)^2),
                                                                  after_WS = sqrt(mean(Mean_t00X_U)^2 + mean(Mean_t00X_V)^2),
                                                                  delta_WS = after_WS - before_WS,
                                                                  #delta_WS = ((after_WS - before_WS)/before_WS)*100,
                                                                  
                                                                  before_WD = atan(mean(Mean_CTRL_V)/mean(Mean_CTRL_U))*(180/pi),
                                                                  after_WD = atan(mean(Mean_t00X_V)/mean(Mean_t00X_U))*(180/pi),
                                                                  delta_WD = after_WD - before_WD) %>% ungroup()
kable(inside_data, format = "latex", digits = 3, booktabs = TRUE)

inside_data_avgs <- inside %>% group_by(year) %>% summarize(treatment = "average",
                                                            before_VPD = mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD),
                                                            delta_VPD = mean(delta_VPD_t00X),#(mean(delta_VPD_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_ALBEDO = mean(Mean_CTRL_ALBEDO),
                                                            delta_ALBEDO = mean(delta_ALBEDO_t00X),#(mean(delta_ALBEDO_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_ALBEDO))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_SWDOWN = mean(Mean_CTRL_SWDOWN),
                                                            delta_SWDOWN = mean(delta_SWDOWN_t00X),#(mean(delta_SWDOWN_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_SWDOWN))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_GT = mean(Mean_CTRL_GT),
                                                            delta_GT = mean(delta_GT_t00X),#(mean(delta_GT_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_GT))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_ET = mean(Mean_CTRL_ET),
                                                            delta_ET = mean(delta_ET_t00X),#(mean(delta_ET_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_ET))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_RAINNC = mean(Mean_CTRL_RAINNC),
                                                            delta_RAINNC = mean(delta_RAINNC_t00X),#(mean(delta_RAINNC_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_RAINNC))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_SM = mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS),
                                                            delta_SM = mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X),#(mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_W = mean(Mean_CTRL_W),
                                                            delta_W = mean(delta_W_t00X),#(mean(delta_W_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_W))*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_WS = sqrt(mean(Mean_CTRL_U)^2 + mean(Mean_CTRL_V)^2),
                                                            after_WS = sqrt(mean(Mean_t00X_U)^2 + mean(Mean_t00X_V)^2),
                                                            delta_WS = after_WS - before_WS,
                                                            #delta_WS = ((after_WS - before_WS)/before_WS)*100,
                                                            
                                                            before_WD = atan(mean(Mean_CTRL_V)/mean(Mean_CTRL_U))*(180/pi),
                                                            after_WD = atan(mean(Mean_t00X_V)/mean(Mean_t00X_U))*(180/pi),
                                                            delta_WD = after_WD - before_WD) %>% ungroup()
kable(inside_data_avgs, format = "latex", digits = 7, booktabs = TRUE)
```


## Outside Environmental Characteristics Table

```{r}
outside_data <- outside_filtered %>% group_by(year, treatment) %>% summarize(before_VPD = mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD),
                                                                             delta_VPD = mean(delta_VPD_t00X),#(mean(delta_VPD_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD))*100,
                                                                             
                                                                             before_VT = mean(Mean_CTRL_VT),
                                                                             delta_VT = mean(delta_VT_t00X),#(mean(delta_VT_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_VT))*100,
                                                                             
                                                                             before_SM = mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS),
                                                                             delta_SM = mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X),#(mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS))*100,
                                                                             
                                                                             before_APAR = mean(Mean_CTRL_APAR),
                                                                             delta_APAR = mean(delta_APAR_t00X),#(mean(delta_APAR_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_APAR))*100,
                                                                             
                                                                             before_GPP = mean(Mean_CTRL_PSN),
                                                                             delta_GPP = mean(delta_PSN_t00X))#(mean(delta_PSN_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_PSN))*100) %>% ungroup()
kable(outside_data, format = "latex", digits = 4, booktabs = TRUE)

outside_data_avgs <- outside_filtered %>% group_by(year) %>% summarize(treatment = "average",
                                                                       before_VPD = mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD),
                                                                       delta_VPD = mean(delta_VPD_t00X),#(mean(delta_VPD_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_VPD))*100,
                                                                       
                                                                       before_VT = mean(Mean_CTRL_VT),
                                                                       delta_VT = mean(delta_VT_t00X),#(mean(delta_VT_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_VT))*100,
                                                                       
                                                                       before_SM = mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS),
                                                                       delta_SM = mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X),#(mean(delta_SMOIS_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_SMOIS))*100,
                                                                       
                                                                       before_APAR = mean(Mean_CTRL_APAR),
                                                                       delta_APAR = mean(delta_APAR_t00X),#(mean(delta_APAR_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_APAR))*100,
                                                                       
                                                                       before_GPP = mean(Mean_CTRL_PSN),
                                                                       delta_GPP = mean(delta_PSN_t00X))#(mean(delta_PSN_t00X)/mean(Mean_CTRL_PSN))*100) %>% ungroup()
kable(outside_data_avgs, format = "latex", digits = 3, booktabs = TRUE)
```


## Spatial vs. Topographic Regressions (inside) Table

```{r}
def_glm_GT_topographic <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_topographic <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_topographic <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_topographic <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_GT_spatial <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_spatial <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_spatial <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_spatial <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_GT_combined <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_combined <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_combined <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_combined <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")


inside_regressions <- data.frame(Variable = c("GT", "VPD", "SM", "ET"),
                                 Statistic = "AIC",
                                 Combined = c(AIC(def_glm_GT_combined), AIC(def_glm_VPD_combined), AIC(def_glm_SM_combined), AIC(def_glm_ET_combined)),
                                 Topographic = c(AIC(def_glm_GT_topographic), AIC(def_glm_VPD_topographic), AIC(def_glm_SM_topographic), AIC(def_glm_ET_topographic)),
                                 Spatial = c(AIC(def_glm_GT_spatial), AIC(def_glm_VPD_spatial), AIC(def_glm_SM_spatial), AIC(def_glm_ET_spatial)))

inside_regressions_deltas <- data.frame(Variable = c("GT", "VPD", "SM", "ET"),
                                 Statistic = "deltaAIC",
                                 Combined = c(AIC(def_glm_GT_combined) - AIC(def_glm_GT_combined), AIC(def_glm_VPD_combined) - AIC(def_glm_VPD_combined), AIC(def_glm_SM_combined) - AIC(def_glm_SM_combined), AIC(def_glm_ET_combined) - AIC(def_glm_ET_combined)),
                                 Topographic = c(AIC(def_glm_GT_topographic) - AIC(def_glm_GT_combined), AIC(def_glm_VPD_topographic) - AIC(def_glm_VPD_combined), AIC(def_glm_SM_topographic) - AIC(def_glm_SM_combined), AIC(def_glm_ET_topographic) - AIC(def_glm_ET_combined)),
                                 Spatial = c(AIC(def_glm_GT_spatial) - AIC(def_glm_GT_combined), AIC(def_glm_VPD_spatial) - AIC(def_glm_VPD_combined), AIC(def_glm_SM_spatial) - AIC(def_glm_SM_combined), AIC(def_glm_ET_spatial) - AIC(def_glm_ET_combined)))

inside_model_table <- bind_rows(inside_regressions, inside_regressions_deltas) %>% group_by(Variable)

kable(inside_model_table, format = "latex", digits = 2, booktabs = TRUE)
```


## GPP GLM Table

```{r}
require(knitr)

intercept.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 1, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
null.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year), data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
AVG.CTRL.GPP.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + Mean_CTRL_PSN, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
X.APAR.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_APAR_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
X.SM.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_SMOIS_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
X.VT.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_VT_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
X.VPD.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_VPD_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
APAR.VT.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_VT_t00X + delta_APAR_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
APAR.VT.SM.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_APAR_t00X + delta_VT_t00X + delta_SMOIS_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
APAR.VT.SM.VPD.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_APAR_t00X + delta_VT_t00X + delta_SMOIS_t00X + delta_VPD_t00X, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)
APAR.VT.SM.VPD.AVG_CTRL.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + delta_APAR_t00X + delta_VT_t00X + delta_SMOIS_t00X + delta_VPD_t00X + Mean_CTRL_PSN, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)


best.model.glm <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + as.factor(treatment):theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:as.factor(year) + as.factor(year):as.factor(treatment):delta_APAR_t00X + as.factor(year):as.factor(treatment):delta_VT_t00X + as.factor(year):as.factor(treatment):delta_SMOIS_t00X + as.factor(year):as.factor(treatment):delta_VPD_t00X + as.factor(year):as.factor(treatment):Mean_CTRL_PSN, data = outside_filtered, family = gaussian)

#GLM_Table <- data.frame(VARIABLE = c("Intercept Only", "Base Model", "AVG.CTRL.GPP", "X.APAR", "X.SM", "X.VT", "X.VPD", "X.VT + X.APAR", "X.VT + X.APAR + X.SM", "X.VT + X.APAR + X.SM + X.VPD"),
#                        AIC = c(AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(null.glm), AIC(AVG.CTRL.GPP.glm), AIC(X.APAR.glm), AIC(X.SM.glm), AIC(X.VT.glm), AIC(X.VPD.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.VPD.glm)),
#                        delta_AIC = c(NA, AIC(null.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(AVG.CTRL.GPP.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(X.APAR.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(X.SM.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(X.VT.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(X.VPD.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.VPD.glm)-AIC(intercept.glm)))

#kable(GLM_Table, format = "latex", digits = 4, booktabs = TRUE)


Ford_formatted_GLM_Table <- data.frame(VARIABLE = c("Best Model", "X.VT + X.APAR + X.SM + X.VPD + AVG.CTRL.GPP", "X.VT + X.APAR + X.SM + X.VPD", "X.VT + X.APAR + X.SM", "X.SM", "X.VPD", "X.VT + X.APAR", "X.APAR", "X.VT", "AVG.CTRL.GPP", "Base Model", "Intercept Only"),
                                       AIC = c(AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.VPD.AVG_CTRL.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.VPD.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.glm), AIC(X.SM.glm), AIC(X.VPD.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.glm), AIC(X.APAR.glm), AIC(X.VT.glm), AIC(AVG.CTRL.GPP.glm), AIC(null.glm), AIC(intercept.glm)),
                                       delta_AIC = c(NA, AIC(APAR.VT.SM.VPD.AVG_CTRL.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.VPD.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.SM.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(X.SM.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(X.VPD.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(APAR.VT.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(X.APAR.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(X.VT.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(AVG.CTRL.GPP.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(null.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm), AIC(intercept.glm)-AIC(best.model.glm)))

kable(Ford_formatted_GLM_Table, format = "latex", digits = 2, booktabs = TRUE)



##THIS CODE SUCKS, BUT WORKS. MODIFIED OTHER CODE IN LAZIEST WAY POSSIBLE. WHOOPS.
last_awful_table <- function(fit){
  cf  <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  idx <- grep("as\\.factor\\(treatment\\).*as\\.factor\\(year\\).*Mean_.*", rownames(cf))
  trm <- rownames(cf)[idx]
  data.frame(year = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(year\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             treatment = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             variable = sub(".*:(Mean_[^:]+)$", "\\1", trm),
             p_val = cf[idx, 4],
             slope = cf[idx, 1],
             row.names = NULL)
}

last.awful.mod <- last_awful_table(best.model.glm) #%>% slice(1:60) #%>% separate(year, into = c("year", "treatment", "variable"), sep = ":") #%>% mutate(year = sub("as\\.factor\\(year\\)", "", year), treatment = sub("as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)", "", treatment))

#last.awful.mod.pivoted <- last.awful.mod %>% select(-p_val) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = slope)
#write.csv(last.awful.mod.pivoted, "~/Desktop/data_for_aov.csv")


last.awful.mod.2017 <- last.awful.mod %>% filter(year == 2017) %>% select(-p_val, -year) %>% mutate(slope = round(slope, 3)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = slope)
last.awful.mod.2018 <- last.awful.mod %>% filter(year == 2018) %>% select(-p_val, -year) %>% mutate(slope = round(slope, 3)) %>% pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = slope)
last.awful.mod.summary <- last.awful.mod %>% group_by(year, variable) %>% summarize(slope = mean(slope))
kable(t(last.awful.mod.2017), format = "latex", digits = 2, booktabs = TRUE)
kable(t(last.awful.mod.2018), format = "latex", digits = 2, booktabs = TRUE)
kable(last.awful.mod.summary, format = "latex", digits = 3, booktabs = TRUE)


require(emmeans)

outside_filtered2 <- outside_filtered %>% mutate(year = as.factor(year), treatment = as.factor(treatment))

#best.model.glm2 <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ year:treatment:delta_APAR_t00X + year:treatment:delta_VT_t00X + year:treatment:delta_SMOIS_t00X + year:treatment:delta_VPD_t00X + year:treatment:Mean_CTRL_PSN + theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:year:treatment, data = outside_filtered2, family = gaussian)


best.model.glm2 <- glm(delta_PSN_t00X ~ 0 + theta_bucket:year:treatment + theta_bucket:distance_to_LU16_km:year:treatment + year:treatment:delta_APAR_t00X + year:treatment:delta_VT_t00X + year:treatment:delta_SMOIS_t00X + year:treatment:delta_VPD_t00X + year:treatment:Mean_CTRL_PSN, data = outside_filtered2, family = gaussian)


sm_slopes_compared <- emtrends(best.model.glm2, pairwise ~ year:treatment, nesting = NULL, var = "delta_SMOIS_t00X", adjust = "Tukey")
vt_slopes_compared <- emtrends(best.model.glm2, pairwise ~ year:treatment, nesting = NULL, var = "delta_VT_t00X", adjust = "Tukey")
apar_slopes_compared <- emtrends(best.model.glm2, pairwise ~ year:treatment, nesting = NULL, var = "delta_APAR_t00X", adjust = "Tukey")
vpd_slopes_compared <- emtrends(best.model.glm2, pairwise ~ year:treatment, nesting = NULL, var = "delta_VPD_t00X", adjust = "Tukey")
mean.gpp_slopes_compared <- emtrends(best.model.glm2, pairwise ~ year:treatment, nesting = NULL, var = "Mean_CTRL_PSN", adjust = "Tukey")

sm_slopes_stat_sig <- summary(sm_slopes_compared$contrasts) %>% mutate(significant = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, 1, 0)) %>% mutate(SM_est_se = paste0(round(estimate,2), "pm", round(SE,2), ifelse(significant == 1, "*", "")))
vt_slopes_stat_sig <- summary(vt_slopes_compared$contrasts) %>% mutate(significant = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, 1, 0)) %>% mutate(VT_est_se = paste0(round(estimate,3), "pm", round(SE,3), ifelse(significant == 1, "*", "")))
apar_slopes_stat_sig <- summary(apar_slopes_compared$contrasts) %>% mutate(significant = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, 1, 0)) %>% mutate(APAR_est_se = paste0(round(estimate,4), "pm", round(SE,4), ifelse(significant == 1, "*", "")))
vpd_slopes_stat_sig <- summary(vpd_slopes_compared$contrasts) %>% mutate(significant = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, 1, 0)) %>% mutate(VPD_est_se = paste0(round(estimate,4), "pm", round(SE,4), ifelse(significant == 1, "*", "")))
mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig <- summary(mean.gpp_slopes_compared$contrasts) %>% mutate(significant = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, 1, 0)) %>% mutate(Init.GPP_est_se = paste0(round(estimate,4), "pm", round(SE,4), ifelse(significant == 1, "*", "")))

prop.table(table(sm_slopes_stat_sig$significant))
prop.table(table(vt_slopes_stat_sig$significant))
prop.table(table(apar_slopes_stat_sig$significant))
prop.table(table(vpd_slopes_stat_sig$significant))
prop.table(table(mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig$significant))

sm_slopes_stat_sig2 <- sm_slopes_stat_sig %>% select(contrast, SM_est_se)
vt_slopes_stat_sig2 <- vt_slopes_stat_sig %>% select(contrast, VT_est_se)
apar_slopes_stat_sig2 <- apar_slopes_stat_sig %>% select(contrast, APAR_est_se)
vpd_slopes_stat_sig2 <- vpd_slopes_stat_sig %>% select(contrast, VPD_est_se)
mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig2 <- mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig %>% select(contrast, Init.GPP_est_se)

slopes_table <- left_join(sm_slopes_stat_sig2, vt_slopes_stat_sig2, by = "contrast")
slopes_table <- left_join(slopes_table, apar_slopes_stat_sig2, by = "contrast")
slopes_table <- left_join(slopes_table, vpd_slopes_stat_sig2, by = "contrast")
slopes_table <- left_join(slopes_table, mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig2, by = "contrast")

#sm_slopes_stat_sig2 <- sm_slopes_stat_sig %>% mutate(SM.p.val = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, "*", NA)) %>% select(contrast, SM.p.val)
#vt_slopes_stat_sig2 <- vt_slopes_stat_sig %>% mutate(VT.p.val = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, "*", NA)) %>% select(contrast, VT.p.val)
#apar_slopes_stat_sig2 <- apar_slopes_stat_sig %>% mutate(APAR.p.val = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, "*", NA)) %>% select(contrast, APAR.p.val)
#vpd_slopes_stat_sig2 <- vpd_slopes_stat_sig %>% mutate(VPD.p.val = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, "*", NA)) %>% select(contrast, VPD.p.val)
#mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig2 <- mean.gpp_slopes_stat_sig %>% mutate(Mean.GPP.p.val = ifelse(p.value <= 0.01, "*", NA)) %>% select(contrast, Mean.GPP.p.val)



options(knitr.kable.NA = '')
kable(slopes_table, format = "latex", digits = 4, booktabs = TRUE)

```
















##################### OLD SHIT #####################





```{r}
def_glm_SW_intercept <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_intercept <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_intercept <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_intercept <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_intercept <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_intercept <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_intercept <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ 1, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year), inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_soil_type <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_soil_type <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_soil_type <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_soil_type <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_soil_type <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_soil_type <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_soil_type <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_elevation <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_elevation <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_elevation <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_elevation <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_elevation <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_elevation <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_elevation <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_norm <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_SW, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_norm <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_GT, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_norm <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_VPD, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_norm <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_SM, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_norm <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_ET, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_norm <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_PRCP, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_norm <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ normalized_ctrl_W, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_soil_base <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_soil_base <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_soil_base <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_soil_base <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_soil_base <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_soil_base <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_soil_base <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_elevation_base <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_elevation_base <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_elevation_base <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_elevation_base <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_elevation_base <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_elevation_base <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_elevation_base <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_elevation_soil <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ ELEVATION + SOIL.TYPE, inside, family = "gaussian")

def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_SWDOWN_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_SW, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_GT_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_GT, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_VPD_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_VPD, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_SMOIS_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_SM, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_ET_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_ET, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_RAINNC_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_PRCP, inside, family = "gaussian")
def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base_norm <- glm(delta_W_t00X ~ r_km:theta_bucket:as.factor(treatment):as.factor(year) + SOIL.TYPE + ELEVATION + normalized_ctrl_W, inside, family = "gaussian")

inside_regressions <- data.frame(Variable = c("SW", "GT", "VPD", "SM", "ET", "PRCP", "W"),
                                 Statistic = "AIC",
                                 Base_Soil_Elev_NORMALIZED_CTRL = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base_norm), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base_norm), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base_norm), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base_norm), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base_norm), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base_norm), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base_norm)),
                                 Base_Soil_Elev = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 #Base_ELEV = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_base), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_base)),
                                 Base_SOIL = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_soil_base)),
                                 #SOIL_ELEV = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil)),
                                 Base_Model = c(AIC(def_glm_SW), AIC(def_glm_GT), AIC(def_glm_VPD), AIC(def_glm_SM), AIC(def_glm_ET), AIC(def_glm_PRCP), AIC(def_glm_W)),
                                 SOIL_TYPE = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_soil_type), AIC(def_glm_GT_soil_type), AIC(def_glm_VPD_soil_type), AIC(def_glm_SM_soil_type), AIC(def_glm_ET_soil_type), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_soil_type), AIC(def_glm_W_soil_type)),
                                 ELEVATION = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation)),
                                 NORMALIZED_CTRL = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_norm), AIC(def_glm_GT_norm), AIC(def_glm_VPD_norm), AIC(def_glm_SM_norm), AIC(def_glm_ET_norm), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_norm), AIC(def_glm_W_norm)),
                                 Intercept = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_intercept), AIC(def_glm_GT_intercept), AIC(def_glm_VPD_intercept), AIC(def_glm_SM_intercept), AIC(def_glm_ET_intercept), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_intercept), AIC(def_glm_W_intercept)))



#Base_Soil_Elev = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),

inside_regressions_deltaAIC <- data.frame(Variable = c("SW", "GT", "VPD", "SM", "ET", "PRCP", "W"),
                                 Statistic = "DeltaAIC",
                                 Base_Soil_Elev = c(NA),
                                 Base_ELEV = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_base)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 Base_SOIL = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_soil_base)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 SOIL_ELEV = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 Base_Model = c(AIC(def_glm_SW)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 SOIL_TYPE = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_soil_type)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 ELEVATION = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_elevation)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)),
                                 Intercept = c(AIC(def_glm_SW_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_SW_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_GT_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_GT_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_VPD_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_VPD_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_SM_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_SM_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_ET_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_ET_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_PRCP_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_PRCP_elevation_soil_base), AIC(def_glm_W_intercept)-AIC(def_glm_W_elevation_soil_base)))

inside_model_table <- bind_rows(inside_regressions, inside_regressions_deltaAIC) %>% group_by(Variable)
```














## CONVECTION PLOTS

```{r}
range(inside$delta_GT_t00X) ## -0.18, 0.18

X.W.inside <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = inside, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_GT_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("GT (K)"), limits = range(c(-3.67, 3.67))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

ctrl_17_July2025 <- read.csv("./data/csvs/July2025/July2025_17.001_all_points.csv") %>% filter(Mean_CTRL_PSN > 2)

range(ctrl_17_July2025$Mean_t00X_W)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = ctrl_17, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_SMOIS_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("GT (K)"), limits = range(c(-0.03, 0.03))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  #facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("~/Desktop/X.GT.inside.pdf", X.W.inside, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
```




## FIG 12) RGB MAPS

```{r}
red_vals <- seq(0, 0.2, 0.04)
green_vals <- seq(0, 0.3, 0.06)
blue_vals <- seq(0, 0.45, 0.09)
colors <- expand.grid(red = red_vals,
                      green = green_vals,
                      blue = blue_vals) %>% mutate(RGB = rgb(red, green, blue))

ggplot(colors, aes(x = green, y = red, fill = RGB)) +
  geom_tile(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.3) +
  #scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = green_vals, labels = green_vals, expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = red_vals, labels = red_vals, expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "green (APAR)", y = "red (VT)") +
  facet_wrap(~blue, nrow = 1, labeller = labeller(blue = function(x) paste("blue (SM) =", x))) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')


df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/NEW_FINAL_SEPT_final_filtered_df.csv")
df_cleaned = na.omit(df)

gamma <- 1
df_cleaned <- df_cleaned %>% mutate(X.APAR.normalized = (abs(X.APAR) / max(abs(df_cleaned$X.APAR)))^gamma,
                                    #X.VPD.normalized = abs(X.VPD) / max(abs(df_cleaned$X.VPD)),
                                    X.VT.normalized = (abs(X.VT) / max(abs(df_cleaned$X.VT)))^gamma,
                                    X.SM.normalized = (abs(X.SM) / max(abs(df_cleaned$X.SM)))^gamma,
                                    delta.RGB = rgb(X.VT.normalized, X.APAR.normalized, X.SM.normalized),
                                    
                                    CTRL.APAR.normalized = abs(AVG.CTRL.APAR) / max(abs(df_cleaned$AVG.CTRL.APAR)),
                                    #CTRL.VPD.normalized = abs(AVG.CTRL.VPD) / max(abs(df_cleaned$AVG.CTRL.VPD)),
                                    CTRL.VT.normalized = abs(AVG.CTRL.VT) / max(abs(df_cleaned$AVG.CTRL.VT)),
                                    CTRL.SM.normalized = abs(AVG.CTRL.SM) / max(abs(df_cleaned$AVG.CTRL.SM)),
                                    ctrl.RGB = rgb(CTRL.VT.normalized, CTRL.APAR.normalized, CTRL.SM.normalized))

#sm_limited <- df_cleaned %>% filter(X.APAR.normalized < 0.5, X.VT.normalized < 0.5, X.SM.normalized < 0.5)

#sm_limited$delta.RGB = rgb(sm_limited$X.VT.normalized + 0.3, sm_limited$X.APAR.normalized + 0.3, sm_limited$X.SM.normalized + 0.3)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = df_cleaned, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta.RGB), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0)  +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  facet_grid(Year ~ Treatment) +
  theme_test() +
  theme(legend.position = 'none', panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

hist(df_cleaned$X.VT.normalized, breaks = 50)
hist(df_cleaned$X.APAR.normalized, breaks = 50)
hist(df_cleaned$X.SM.normalized, breaks = 50)


hist(df_cleaned$CTRL.VT.normalized, breaks = 50)
hist(df_cleaned$CTRL.APAR.normalized, breaks = 50)
hist(df_cleaned$CTRL.SM.normalized, breaks = 50)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = sm_limited, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = X.APAR.normalized), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  facet_grid(Year ~ Treatment)

range(sm_limited$X.APAR.normalized)
range(sm_limited$X.VT.normalized)
range(sm_limited$X.SM.normalized)



key_colors <- sm_limited %>%
  select(delta.RGB, X.VT.normalized, X.APAR.normalized, X.SM.normalized) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  head(100)  # optional: limit to 100 points for display

ggplot(key_colors, aes(x = X.APAR.normalized, y = X.VT.normalized, fill = delta.RGB)) +
  geom_tile(color = "lightgray", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  labs(x = "green (APAR)", y = "red (VT)") +
  facet_wrap(~X.SM.normalized, nrow = 1)
```








## THETA BUCKET MAPS

```{r}
require(geosphere)
theta_bucket_maps <- ctrl_17 %>% select(Latitude, Longitude, X)

calculate_polar <- function(lat, lon) {
  r <- distHaversine(c(-81.21869, 37.57799), c(lon, lat))
  theta <- atan2(lat - 37.57799, lon - -81.21869)
  return(c(r, theta))}

theta_bucket_maps <- theta_bucket_maps %>% rowwise() %>%
  mutate(polar = list(calculate_polar(Latitude, Longitude)),
         r = polar[1],
         theta = polar[2]) %>%
  select(-polar)
theta_bucket_maps <- theta_bucket_maps %>% mutate(theta_bucket = case_when(theta >= 0 & theta < pi/4 ~ "Bucket 1",
                                                                           theta >= pi/4 & theta < pi/2 ~ "Bucket 2",
                                                                           theta >= pi/2 & theta < 3*pi/4 ~ "Bucket 3",
                                                                           theta >= 3*pi/4 & theta <= pi ~ "Bucket 4",
                                                                           theta < -3*pi/4 & theta >= -pi ~ "Bucket 5",
                                                                           theta < -pi/2 & theta >= -3*pi/4 ~ "Bucket 6",
                                                                           theta < -pi/4 & theta >= -pi/2 ~ "Bucket 7",
                                                                           theta < 0 & theta >= -pi/4 ~ "Bucket 8"))


theta_buckets_graph <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = theta_bucket_maps, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = theta_bucket), shape = 15, size = 1.2) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, color = "Theta Bucket") +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = 12), legend.title = element_text(size = 12)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, override.aes = list(size = 5)))

ggsave("~/Desktop/theta_buckets.pdf", theta_buckets_graph, width = 6, height = 6, units = "in")
```





## New Figure 5) Windspeeds

```{r}
inside_luc1.17 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_17.001_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 1)
inside_luc2.17 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_17.002_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 2)
inside_luc3.17 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_17.003_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 3)
inside_luc4.17 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_17.004_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 4)
inside_luc5.17 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_17.005_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 5)
inside_luc6.17 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_17.006_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2017, treatment = 6)
inside_luc1.18 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_18.001_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 1)
inside_luc2.18 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_18.002_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 2)
inside_luc3.18 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_18.003_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 3)
inside_luc4.18 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_18.004_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 4)
inside_luc5.18 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_18.005_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 5)
inside_luc6.18 <- read.csv("CSVs/July2025_18.006_deforested_points_only.csv") %>% mutate(year = 2018, treatment = 6)

inside <- bind_rows(inside_luc1.17, inside_luc2.17, inside_luc3.17, inside_luc4.17, inside_luc5.17, inside_luc6.17,
                    inside_luc1.18, inside_luc2.18, inside_luc3.18, inside_luc4.18, inside_luc5.18, inside_luc6.18)

wind_data <- inside %>% group_by(year, treatment) %>% summarize(before_u = mean(Mean_CTRL_U),
                                                                before_v = mean(Mean_CTRL_V),
                                                                after_u = mean(Mean_t00X_U),
                                                                after_v = mean(Mean_t00X_V),
                                                                before_Windspeed = sqrt(before_u^2 + before_v^2),
                                                                after_Windspeed = sqrt(after_u^2 + after_v^2),
                                                                before_Wind_direction = atan(before_v/before_u),
                                                                after_Wind_direction = atan(after_v/after_u)) %>% ungroup()

avg_wind_data <- wind_data %>% group_by(year) %>% summarize(before_Windspeed = mean(before_Windspeed),
                                                            after_Windspeed = mean(after_Windspeed),
                                                            before_Wind_direction = mean(before_Wind_direction),
                                                            after_Wind_direction = mean(after_Wind_direction))
windspeed_plot <- ggplot(data = wind_data) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = before_u, y = before_v, color = factor(treatment))) +
  geom_point(aes(x = after_u, y = after_v, color = factor(treatment))) +
  geom_segment(arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")), aes(x = before_u, y = before_v, xend = after_u, yend = after_v, color = factor(treatment))) +
  xlim(0.64, 1.4) +
  ylim(0.54, 1.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 2, strip.position = "right") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "U (m/s)", y = "V (m/s)") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name = "Treatment") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  #labs(title = expression(Delta * "Windspeed (m/s)"))

ggsave("~/Desktop/windspeed_plot.pdf", windspeed_plot, width = 3, height = 4.5, units = "in")
```




REMOVED FROM ABOVE:
windspeed_plot <- ggplot(data = wind_data) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = before_u, y = before_v, fill = factor(year)), size = 3, shape = 21) +
  geom_point(aes(x = after_u, y = after_v, fill = factor(year)), size = 3, shape = 21) +
  geom_segment(arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")), aes(x = before_u, y = before_v, xend = after_u, yend = after_v, color = factor(treatment))) +
  xlim(0.64, 1.4) +
  ylim(0.54, 1.3) +
  #facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 2, strip.position = "right") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "U (m/s)", y = "V (m/s)") +
  scale_color_scico_d(name = "Treatment", palette = "hawaii") +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Year", values = c("2017" = "red", "2018" = "lightblue")) +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  #labs(title = expression(Delta * "Windspeed (m/s)"))




## DEFORESTATION DOT PLOT ##

```{r}
make_awful_table_def <- function(fit, var){
  cf  <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  idx <- grep("r_km:theta_bucket", rownames(cf))
  trm <- rownames(cf)[idx]
  data.frame(theta_bucket = sub(".*theta_bucketbucket([^:]+):.*", "\\1", trm),
             variable = var,
             year = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(year\\)([0-9]+)$", "\\1", trm),
             treatment = sub(".*as\\.factor\\(treatment\\)([0-9]+).*", "\\1", trm),
             p_val = cf[idx, 4],
             slope = cf[idx, 1],
             row.names = NULL)
}

def_GT.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_GT, "GT")
def_VPD.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_VPD, "VPD")
def_SW.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_SW, "SW")
def_SM.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_SM, "SM")
def_ET.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_ET, "ET")
def_PRCP.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_PRCP, "PRCP")
def_W.mods <- make_awful_table_def(def_glm_W, "W")

all_def_mods_table <- bind_rows(def_GT.mods, def_VPD.mods, def_SW.mods, def_SM.mods, def_ET.mods, def_PRCP.mods, def_W.mods)

range(def_GT.mods$slope) #-0.064, 0.064
range(def_VPD.mods$slope) #-5.64, 5.64
range(def_SW.mods$slope) #-0.17, 0.17
range(def_SM.mods$slope) #-0.0013, 0.0013
range(def_ET.mods$slope) #-4.12e-07, 4.12e-07
range(def_PRCP.mods$slope) #-0.042, 0.042
range(def_W.mods$slope) #-0.0013, 0.0013


mods_graph_legend_labels <- c("GT" = "GT", "VPD" = "VPD", "ET" = "ET", "SM" = "SM", "SW" = "SW", "PRCP" = "PRCP", "W" = "W")

#var_temp <- all_mods_table$variable == "SM"
#range(all_mods_table$slope[var_temp])

scico_lims <- list("GT" = c(-0.064, 0.064),
                   "VPD" = c(-5.64, 5.64),
                   "ET" = c(-4.12e-07, 4.12e-07),
                   "SM" = c(-0.0006, 0.0006),
                   "SW" = c(-0.17, 0.17),
                   "PRCP" = c(-0.042, 0.042),
                   "W" = c(-0.0013, 0.0013))

scico_breaks <- list("GT" = c(-0.03, 0.03),
                   "VPD" = c(-2.5, 2.5),
                   "ET" = c(-2e-07, 2e-07),
                   "SM" = c(-0.0003, 0.0003),
                   "SW" = c(-0.1, 0.1),
                   "PRCP" = c(-0.021, 0.021),
                   "W" = c(-0.0007, 0.0007))


mods_graph <- ggplot()
for (g in unique(all_def_mods_table$variable)) {
  df <- all_def_mods_table %>% filter(variable == g)
  mods_graph <- mods_graph + new_scale_color() + geom_point(data = df, aes(x = treatment, y = theta_bucket, color = slope, size = pmin(-log10(p_val), 10))) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = paste(mods_graph_legend_labels[g]), direction = -1, limits = scico_lims[[g]], breaks = scico_breaks[[g]])
}
save_mods_graph <- mods_graph + 
  facet_grid(year ~ variable) +
  theme_bw() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.75) +
  labs(x = "LC Scenario", y = "Theta Bucket") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.key.width = unit(0.62, "cm"), strip.text = element_text(size = 16))

#ggsave("~/Desktop/Def_dotplot3.pdf", save_mods_graph, width = 17, height = 6.5, units = "in")




```




## FIGS 6, 7, 8, 9, & 12) Predictor: where you are in the control space relative to the average || On the Y: the delta value

```{r}
range(outside_filtered$delta_VPD_t00X) ## -93, 93
range(outside_filtered$delta_VT_t00X) ## -0.91, 0.91
range(outside_filtered$delta_SMOIS_t00X) ## -0.03, 0.03 ## -0.032, 0.032
range(outside_filtered$delta_APAR_t00X) ## -4.60, 4.60
range(outside_filtered$delta_PSN_t00X) ## -0.91, 0.91 ## -0.98, 0.98

X.VPD <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_VPD_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("VPD (Pa)"), limits = range(c(-93, 93))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

X.VT <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_VT_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("Veg Temp (K)"), limits = range(c(-0.91, 0.91))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

X.SM <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_SMOIS_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("SM (m3/m3)"), limits = range(c(-0.032, 0.032)), breaks = (c(-0.015, 0.015))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

X.APAR <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_APAR_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("APAR (W/m2/)"), limits = range(c(-4.60, 4.60))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

full_6789 <- ggarrange(X.APAR, X.VT, X.VPD, X.SM, ncol = 1)

ggsave("~/Desktop/full.pdf", full_6789, width = 12, height = 18, units = "in")


X.GPP <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = outside_filtered, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude, color = delta_PSN_t00X), shape = 15, size = 0.33) +
  scale_color_scico(palette = "vik", name = expression("GPP (umol co2/m2/s)"), limits = range(c(-0.98, 0.98))) +
  geom_sf(data = combined_regions, color = "grey", linewidth = 0.1, alpha = 0) + 
  #geom_sf(data = selected_states, fill = "NA", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-80, -82.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(37, 38.5)) +
  theme_test() +
  facet_grid(year ~ treatment) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-83.4, -79), ylim = c(36, 39.1), expand = FALSE) +
  #standardized_theme +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"), plot.title = element_text(size = 16), legend.position = "bottom")

#ggsave("~/Desktop/outside_filtered/X.VPD.pdf", X.VPD, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
#ggsave("~/Desktop/outside_filtered/X.VT.pdf", X.VT, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
#ggsave("~/Desktop/outside_filtered/X.SM.pdf", X.SM, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
#ggsave("~/Desktop/outside_filtered/X.APAR.pdf", X.APAR, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
#ggsave("~/Desktop/outside_filtered/X.GPP.pdf", X.GPP, width = 12, height = 4.5, units = "in")
```




## MODEL CODE

```{r}
# FIRST ORDER OF BUSINESS: COMBINE ALL THE DATAFRAMES, INCLUDING INFO RELATED TO SOIL TYPE, ELEVATION, ETC.
```
